positive: A central, symmetrical, highly detailed mystical botanical pattern featuring bioluminescent celestial flora. Depict intertwined vines, geometric celestial constellation lines, and oversized glowing glowing pocket flowers in deep sapphire, emerald teal, and vibrant gold accents.
